TextView.android:text:
Q: How do I apply for a loan?
A: Open the Dashboard and tap Apply Loan, fill in the amount, term and purpose, then submit.

Q: How do I check my loan status?
A: Open My Loans from the Dashboard or the navigation drawer to see all your applications and their status.

Q: How do I reset my password?
A: On the Login screen, tap Forgot Password and enter your registered email.

Q: How do I contact support?
A: Open Contact Us from the navigation drawer to call or message our support line directly.
